detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (BISK.sol#527-561):
	External calls:
	- require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount)) (BISK.sol#549)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount (BISK.sol#555)
	MiniMeToken.allowed (BISK.sol#241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address) (BISK.sol#575-581)
	- MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (BISK.sol#527-561)
	- MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (BISK.sol#375-405)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](BISK.sol#L527-L561):
	External calls:
	- [require(bool)(TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount))](BISK.sol#L549)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount](BISK.sol#L555)
	[MiniMeToken.allowed](BISK.sol#L241) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address)](BISK.sol#L575-L581)
	- [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](BISK.sol#L527-L561)
	- [MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256)](BISK.sol#L375-L405)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in BISK.initTokens(address[],uint256[],bool,bool) (BISK.sol#1267-1305):
	External calls:
	- super.generateTokens(_tos[i],_amts[i]) (BISK.sol#1283)
		- parentToken.totalSupplyAt(min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (BISK.sol#729)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock)) (BISK.sol#679)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- finishGenerating() (BISK.sol#1291)
		- generateFinished = true (BISK.sol#1321)
	BISK.generateFinished (BISK.sol#1229) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- BISK.finishGenerating() (BISK.sol#1319-1325)
	- BISK.generateFinished (BISK.sol#1229)
	- BISK.generateTokens(address,uint256) (BISK.sol#1257-1263)
	- BISK.initTokens(address[],uint256[],bool,bool) (BISK.sol#1267-1305)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [BISK.initTokens(address[],uint256[],bool,bool)](BISK.sol#L1267-L1305):
	External calls:
	- [super.generateTokens(_tos[i],_amts[i])](BISK.sol#L1283)
		- [parentToken.totalSupplyAt(min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock))](BISK.sol#L729)
		- [parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,min(_blockNumber,parentSnapShotBlock))](BISK.sol#L679)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [finishGenerating()](BISK.sol#L1291)
		- [generateFinished = true](BISK.sol#L1321)
	[BISK.generateFinished](BISK.sol#L1229) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [BISK.finishGenerating()](BISK.sol#L1319-L1325)
	- [BISK.generateFinished](BISK.sol#L1229)
	- [BISK.generateTokens(address,uint256)](BISK.sol#L1257-L1263)
	- [BISK.initTokens(address[],uint256[],bool,bool)](BISK.sol#L1267-L1305)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.25 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)

	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.25 (BISK.sol#1)
